title: Grilled Canadian Beef Gratin
description: A rich and flavorful dish featuring tender grilled beef in a creamy gratin sauce.
instructions: Season the beef tenderloin with salt and pepper.
Grill the beef for 4-5 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the beef to a plate and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
In a large saucepan, melt the gourmet butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to combine; cook for 1-2 minutes.
Slowly pour in the warmed beef broth, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until it thickens.
Stir in the grated cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the heavy cream and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until heated through.
Slice the grilled beef into thin medallions and serve with the gratin sauce spooned over the top.
